title: festuca duriuscula subsp. ochroleuca
intro: Festuca duriuscula subsp. ochroleuca is a subspecies of Festuca duriuscula, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is also known as yellow-green fescue or mountain fescue, and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Festuca duriuscula subsp. ochroleuca include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe and calm the body, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
